title: SLA document (API Quality v1)
description: Normative JSON shape for sla_hash commitment; must match oracle-qa SlaDocument deserialization. Core keys are evaluated; additional keys are ignored by oracle-qa v1 (serde forward-compat).

version.description: Profile major version; v1 for x402/oracle-qa/api-quality/v1.

endpoint.description: Declarative URI for the agreed API resource (oracle does not replay HTTP in v1).

profile_id.description: When set, MUST be this value for v1; mismatches are rejected by the evaluator.

response_schema.description: Optional JSON Schema for response_body in delivery evidence.

min_body_length.description: Minimum UTF-8 length of JSON.stringify(response_body) in evidence.
